name: Donald J. Trump
role: 45th & 47th President of the United States (2017–2021, 2025–)
quote: I ask that all Americans recommit with their hearts to resolving our differences peacefully. [On WHCD shooting, Apr 26, 2026 — calling suspect Cole Allen a 'lone wolf whack job' and 'very sick person']

name: JD Vance
role: Vice President of the United States (2025–); cast tie-breaking vote to pass 'One Big Beautiful Bill'; led Islamabad proximity talks Apr 11-12 (collapsed after 21 hours); arrived in Islamabad Apr 20 for second round with Witkoff and Kushner — Iran's Foreign Ministry refused to send delegation; Trump extended ceasefire Apr 21 indefinitely at Pakistan's request; IRGC seized 2 ships in Hormuz Apr 22
quote: The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement, and I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States. They have chosen not to accept our terms.

name: Mike Pence
role: Vice President under Trump (2017–2021); refused to block Electoral College certification on Jan. 6
quote: President Trump is wrong. I had no right to overturn the election. The presidency belongs to the American people and the American people alone.

name: Elon Musk
role: Head of DOGE (Jan–May 2025); DOGE informal adviser (May 2025–); CEO of Tesla, SpaceX, and X; announced April 1 he will scale back to 1-2 days/week on DOGE starting May as Tesla Q1 profit fell 71%
quote: I need to get back to my companies. Tesla needs me. I'll still spend a couple days a week on DOGE — the work isn't done — but the heavy lifting is done.

name: Nancy Pelosi
role: Speaker of the House (2019–2023); managed both Trump impeachments
quote: The president must be held accountable. No one is above the law.

name: Mitch McConnell
role: Senate Majority Leader (2015–2021, 2025); blocked Garland, confirmed Gorsuch/Kavanaugh/Barrett; voted to acquit Trump twice
quote: The mob was fed lies. They were provoked by the president and other powerful people, and they tried to use fear and violence to stop a specific proceeding of the first branch.

name: Rudy Giuliani
role: Trump's Personal Attorney (2018–2021); led post-election legal challenges; disbarred in 2024
quote: Truth is truth. We have many witnesses. The truth will set him free.

name: Steve Bannon
role: Trump's Chief Strategist (2017); founder of Breitbart; sentenced to prison in 2024 for contempt of Congress
quote: Darkness is good. Dick Cheney. Darth Vader. Satan. That's power.

name: Robert Mueller
role: Special Counsel (2017–2019); former FBI Director; led Russia investigation resulting in 37 indictments
quote: If we had had confidence that the president clearly did not commit a crime, we would have said so.

name: Liz Cheney
role: Republican Congresswoman, Wyoming (2017–2023); Vice Chair of Jan. 6 Select Committee; voted to impeach Trump; lost primary in 2022
quote: President Trump is a clear and present danger to our republic. I will do everything in my power to ensure he is never again near the Oval Office.

name: Adam Schiff
role: Chairman of House Intelligence Committee (2019–2023); lead impeachment manager in first trial; now US Senator, California
quote: The facts are not in dispute. The only question is whether we care enough about our democracy to defend it.

name: Mitt Romney
role: US Senator, Utah (2019–2025); only Republican to vote to convict Trump in both impeachment trials
quote: The president is guilty of an appalling abuse of public trust. This is the most difficult decision I have ever faced and I have paid careful heed to every argument advanced by the president's counsel.

name: Jeff Sessions
role: US Attorney General (2017–2018); recused from Russia investigation; fired by Trump via Twitter in November 2018
quote: I took control of the Department of Justice the day I was sworn in. Which I did — so that when they talk about collusion or whatever, they can say whatever they want to say.

name: William Barr
role: US Attorney General (2019–2020); released Mueller Report with controversial summary; said DOJ found no fraud to change 2020 result; resigned December 2020
quote: We have not seen fraud on a scale that could have effected a different outcome in the election.

name: Mike Pompeo
role: CIA Director (2017–2018); Secretary of State (2018–2021); led diplomatic negotiations with North Korea, Iran, and allies
quote: We will crush Iran's will to develop nuclear weapons. The Iranian people will come to see us as their friend.

name: Marco Rubio
role: Secretary of State (2025–); led pre-war nuclear negotiations with Iran; overseeing US-Israel military coordination
quote: Iran had its chance for a diplomatic solution. They chose confrontation. The United States and our allies will ensure they never obtain a nuclear weapon.

name: Jim Jordan
role: Republican Congressman, Ohio; Chairman House Judiciary Committee; one of Trump's most vocal congressional defenders and allies
quote: They have been trying to stop Donald Trump from day one. This is a coordinated effort by the Democrats to use the justice system against the leading presidential candidate.

name: Jack Smith
role: Special Counsel (2022–2024); led federal classified documents and January 6 prosecutions against Trump; dropped cases after Trump won 2024 election
quote: The defendants conduct was fueled by his refusal to accept the fact of his defeat in the 2020 election. Men and women gave their lives to defeat fascism and protect the right of Americans to vote.

name: Fani Willis
role: Fulton County District Attorney; filed 2023 RICO indictment against Trump and 18 co-defendants for alleged conspiracy to overturn Georgia's 2020 election
quote: I am not intimidated. I took an oath to the people of Fulton County. No amount of threats and harassment will make me abandon my oath.

name: Mike Johnson
role: Speaker of the House (2023–); helped lead legal challenges to 2020 election results as a congressman; strong Trump ally
quote: We're going to make sure we have a government that functions for the people and spends their money wisely.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
role: Republican Congresswoman, Georgia; prominent MAGA figure; introduced articles of impeachment against Biden on Day 1 of his term
quote: The only party trying to overthrow the government is the Democrat party. January 6th was just a riot at the Capitol.

name: Hillary Clinton
role: 2016 Democratic presidential nominee; Secretary of State (2009–2013); lost to Trump in the 2016 electoral college
quote: What happened wasn't just about me. It was about every American who believes that we all deserve a president who puts the common good ahead of personal gain and wealth.

name: Kamala Harris
role: Vice President (2021–2025); 2024 Democratic presidential nominee; lost to Trump 306-232 in the Electoral College
quote: Donald Trump has no plan for the future. All he offers is fear, anger, and chaos — we offer a vision for a brighter future for all Americans.

name: John Kelly
role: White House Chief of Staff (2017–2019); former DHS Secretary; later publicly called Trump 'unfit for office'
quote: He is fascist to the core. He would rule as a dictator if allowed to do so. I think he is the most flawed individual I've ever known.

name: Merrick Garland
role: US Attorney General (2021–2025); SCOTUS nominee blocked by McConnell in 2016; oversaw appointments of Special Counsel Jack Smith to investigate Trump
quote: The rule of law is not just some lawyers' business. It is the foundation on which everything else in our society depends.

name: Pete Hegseth
role: Secretary of Defense (2025–); directing US-Israel joint strikes on Iran; announced 15,000+ targets hit across Iran
quote: The President has been clear: Iran will not get a nuclear weapon. I am quite disappointed that we are pausing strikes to pursue diplomacy, but I respect the Commander-in-Chief's decision. The military option remains fully on the table.

name: Todd Blanche
role: Acting Attorney General (2025–); former Trump personal attorney who successfully defended him in the New York hush money trial; overseeing federal prosecution of WHCD shooting suspect Cole Allen; confirmed Allen was likely targeting Trump administration officials 'including the President'
quote: The investigation has established a clear and specific intent by Cole Allen to target senior Trump administration officials, including the President of the United States. This was not a random act — this was premeditated.

name: Scott Bessent
role: Secretary of the Treasury (2025–); managing tariff regime restructuring after SCOTUS IEEPA ruling; overseeing Iran sanctions relief
quote: We are allowing Iranian oil tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz. Managing oil price impacts is our top economic priority. The General License U waiver is narrowly tailored and temporary — it is not a windfall for Tehran.
